prompt: Run imprint audit. The existing UI has cards, buttons, and forms built across several sessions and I suspect spacing and color drift.
assertions: Recognizes this as audit mode rather than single-component imprinting
Scans all UI components or clearly scopes how it would find them
Lists conflicts for radius, background, text colors, spacing, borders, and interactive states where applicable
Flags hardcoded hex values, raw color classes, or non-token values
Recommends a baseline based on majority usage and design-system tokens
Stops for developer confirmation before establishing the baseline in ui-registry.md
